entities.entity_data_example: {"user_story": "As a user, I want to authenticate myself so that I can access deployment and environment configuration features.", "use_case": {"name": "Authenticate User", "api_endpoint": "POST /deploy/cyoda-env", "request_format": {"user_name": "test"}, "response_format": {"token": "Bearer your_access_token"}}}

{"user_story": "As a user, I want to deploy a Cyoda environment specific to my user account.", "use_case": {"name": "Create Deployment for Cyoda Environment", "api_endpoint": "POST /deploy/cyoda-env", "request_format": {"user_name": "test"}, "action": "POST https://teamcity.cyoda.org/app/rest/buildQueue", "payload": {"buildType": {"id": "KubernetesPipeline_CyodaSaas"}, "properties": {"property": [{"name": "user_defined_keyspace", "value": "test"}, {"name": "user_defined_namespace", "value": "test"}]}}}, "response_format": {"build_id": "12345"}}}

{"user_story": "As a user, I want to deploy my application using a Git repository.", "use_case": {"name": "Create User Application Deployment", "api_endpoint": "POST /deploy/user_app", "request_format": {"repository_url": "http://....", "is_public": "true"}, "action": "POST https://teamcity.cyoda.org/app/rest/buildQueue", "payload": {"buildType": {"id": "KubernetesPipeline_CyodaSaasUserEnv"}, "properties": {"property": [{"name": "user_defined_keyspace", "value": "test"}, {"name": "user_defined_namespace", "value": "test"}]}}}, "response_format": {"build_id": "54321"}}}

{"user_story": "As a user, I want to check the status of my deployments.", "use_case": {"name": "Get Deployment Status", "api_endpoint": "GET /deploy/cyoda-env/status/{id}", "request_format": "Path variable", "action": "GET https://teamcity.cyoda.org/app/rest/buildQueue/id:build_id", "response_format": {"status": "running", "details": "..."}}}

{"user_story": "As a user, I want to retrieve statistical information about my deployments.", "use_case": {"name": "Get Deployment Statistics", "api_endpoint": "GET /deploy/cyoda-env/statistics/{id}", "request_format": "Path variable", "action": "GET https://teamcity.cyoda.org/app/rest/builds/id:build_id/statistics/", "response_format": {"statistics": {...}}}}

{"user_story": "As a user, I want to cancel a deployment if needed.", "use_case": {"name": "Cancel User Application Deployment", "api_endpoint": "POST /deploy/cancel/user_app/{id}", "request_format": "Path variable", "action": "POST https://teamcity.cyoda.org/app/rest/builds/id:build_id", "payload": {"comment": "Canceling a queued build", "readdIntoQueue": false}, "response_format": {"status": "canceled"}}}
